title: COS101: Computer Input Devices
description: Fundamental concepts of computer input devices and how they interact with computer systems.

topics.title: Introduction to Input Devices
topics.description: Basic concepts, functions, and examples of computer input devices.

questions.question: An input device is primarily used to:
questions.explanation: Input devices allow users to enter data and instructions into a computer system.

questions.question: Which of the following is an example of an input device?
questions.explanation: A keyboard is used to input text and commands into the computer.

questions.question: Which device is commonly used to type text into a computer?
questions.explanation: The keyboard allows users to type letters, numbers, and symbols.

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT an input device?
questions.explanation: A printer is an output device because it produces printed documents.

questions.question: Which device captures sound as input?
questions.explanation: A microphone converts sound waves into electrical signals for the computer.

questions.question: Which input device is mainly used to control the cursor on the screen?
questions.explanation: The mouse is an input device used to control the cursor on the screen.

questions.question: Which input device is mainly used to convert paper documents into digital images?
questions.explanation: The scanner is an input device used to convert paper documents into digital images.

questions.question: Which input device is mainly used to capture images and video input?
questions.explanation: The webcam is an input device used to capture images and video input.

questions.question: Which input device is mainly used to allow users to interact directly with the display?
questions.explanation: The touchscreen is an input device used to allow users to interact directly with the display.

questions.question: Which input device is mainly used to control movement in games and simulations?
questions.explanation: The joystick is an input device used to control movement in games and simulations.

questions.question: Which input device is mainly used to control the cursor on the screen?
questions.explanation: The mouse is an input device used to control the cursor on the screen.
